title: Senior Software Engineer
summary: Senior Software Engineer with over 10 years of experience building scalable web and mobile applications across startup and enterprise environments. Expert in full-stack development using React, TypeScript, Node.js, and Python, with deep experience designing microservices, REST APIs, and cloud-native systems on AWS. Passionate about building performant, user-focused products and mentoring engineering teams while delivering reliable, production-ready software.

professionalExperiences.title: Senior Software Engineer
responsibilities: Built and optimized RESTful APIs and microservices using Node.js and NestJS to support financial data integrations and improve system performance.
Architected scalable backend services supporting financial web and mobile applications using Node.js.
Developed reusable UI components with React and TailwindCSS to maintain a consistent design system across financial products.
Implemented Python-based data processing services to automate analytics and reporting workflows.
Collaborated with designers, product managers, and mobile engineers to deliver new features and improve product functionality.
Containerized services with Docker and deployed applications within AWS infrastructure.
Implemented CI/CD pipelines and automated testing to improve deployment reliability and release speed.
Mentored engineers and led engineering discussions on architecture and product improvements.

professionalExperiences.title: Senior Software Engineer
responsibilities: Developed consumer-facing financial web applications using React, TypeScript, Python, and Django.
Maintained frontend architecture and established code quality standards across the engineering team.
Diagnosed and resolved operational issues to ensure reliability of mission-critical financial systems.
Collaborated with business stakeholders to translate financial and regulatory requirements into technical solutions.
Managed millions of financial transaction records using PostgreSQL while ensuring data integrity and compliance.
Improved infrastructure performance and deployment pipelines to increase engineering delivery velocity.
Built automated testing suites using Jest and Cypress to improve software quality.
Mentored junior engineers and conducted code reviews to maintain engineering standards.

professionalExperiences.title: Full-stack Developer
responsibilities: Built and maintained responsive real estate web applications using React, Python, and AWS components, enhancing the efficiency of digital home transactions.
Designed and developed user-friendly web interfaces with Angular and React, improving the homebuying and selling experience for customers.
Mentored and guided junior software engineers, fostering a culture of collaboration and continuous improvement through architecture discussions, design reviews, and code evaluations.
Developed and optimized backend services with Django and GraphQL, improving data processing and integration with third-party real estate and financial APIs.
Collaborated closely with product, operations, and data teams to identify opportunities for process improvement, streamlining workflows and enhancing automation in real estate transactions.

Evaluated, integrated, and extended commercial products using REST web services and message queues, contributing to the scalability and efficiency of digital property valuation and transaction systems.
Troubleshot and resolved software issues across multiple layers, including deployment, configuration, and both server-side and client-side challenges.

professionalExperiences.title: Full-stack Developer
responsibilities: Worked mostly on the recommendation pipeline, the team’s key product, which significantly improved the company’s revenue from ads. Added new recommendation types, migrated to a new way of estimating revenue uplifts, simplified and optimized parts of it.
Deployed and scaled applications on AWS, leveraging services like EC2, RDS, and Lambda to create a robust, secure, and scalable infrastructure.
Spearheaded the development of an internal management system, enhancing operational efficiency and streamlining workflows across departments.
Utilized React for building dynamic user interfaces, ensuring responsive and user-friendly web applications.
Developed backend functionalities using Python and Django, enabling robust data processing and business logic implementation.
Employed GitHub for version control and collaboration, enhancing code quality through effective team workflows.
Designed and maintained responsive web layouts using HTML, CSS, and Material UI, ensuring a consistent look and feel across all platforms.
